mxCell.value:
Bot persona = a mandatory Component in any LLM or hybrid flow.


It defines the bot’s personality – name, gender, tone of voice, etc.


It also sets the default values for the LLM provider/model and service host if these are not defined at the level of other Components (such as the Dialog node).
<font style="font-size: 27px">Base prompt in the respective language.</font>
